# roadmapArchive

Archives a roadmap.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`RoadmapArchivePayload`](../objects/roadmap_archive_payload-object.md)!

## Deprecation

Roadmaps are deprecated, use initiatives instead.
